name: ts-runtypes-pre-publish-e2e-deps
description: Builder toolchains baked into the shared image for the pre-publish e2e feature matrix. Only these (never-changing) toolchains are baked; each e2e run installs just the changing @ts-runtypes/* from verdaccio ON TOP of this node_modules. vite is aliased to rolldown-vite (Vite-on-Rolldown, the modern consumer stack build-vite exercises). The assertion tests use node:test (built-in), so no test runner is baked. Versions are exact-pinned to releases older than the 30-day minimumReleaseAge cutoff.
